```{r}
  caption = "Table 1: Consistency between yearly totals and differencing estimates (2019–2023, Barcelona)",
  align = c("l","r")
)
```

- Additions concentrated in dense, central tracts (D3_C3, D3_C2, D2_C1 ≈ 46 %)

- Removals more scattered, mostly intermediate-density tracts

```{r}
#| label: 23-strata-table
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

# ---- Ensure change layers exist (build if needed) ----------------------------
if (!exists("added") || !inherits(added, "sf") || !exists("removed") || !inherits(removed, "sf")) {
  stopifnot(exists("cyc19_n"), exists("cyc23_n"), exists("tol_m"))
  crs_work <- sf::st_crs(cyc23_n)
  cyc19_buf <- sf::st_buffer(sf::st_union(sf::st_geometry(cyc19_n)), tol_m)
  cyc23_buf <- sf::st_buffer(sf::st_union(sf::st_geometry(cyc23_n)), tol_m)
  added <- sf::st_difference(sf::st_geometry(cyc23_n), cyc19_buf) |>
           sf::st_collection_extract("LINESTRING", warn = FALSE) |>
           sf::st_sf(crs = crs_work)
  removed <- sf::st_difference(sf::st_geometry(cyc19_n), cyc23_buf) |>
             sf::st_collection_extract("LINESTRING", warn = FALSE) |>
             sf::st_sf(crs = crs_work)
  added   <- added[!sf::st_is_empty(added), , drop = FALSE]
  removed <- removed[!sf::st_is_empty(removed), , drop = FALSE]
}

# ---- Pick a tract layer & harmonise CRS -------------------------------------
tract_layer <- if (exists("tracts_work")) tracts_work else
               if (exists("tracts"))      tracts else
               if (exists("barcelona_tracts")) barcelona_tracts else
               stop("No tract layer found (tracts_work / tracts / barcelona_tracts).")

tracts_work <- sf::st_transform(tract_layer, sf::st_crs(added))

# tract id column (set explicitly if you prefer)
id_col <- dplyr::case_when(
  "tract_id"     %in% names(tracts_work) ~ "tract_id",
  "CUSEC"        %in% names(tracts_work) ~ "CUSEC",
  "codi_seccio"  %in% names(tracts_work) ~ "codi_seccio",
  TRUE ~ names(tracts_work)[1]
)

# ---- Faster length-by-tract using spatial index ------------------------------
length_by_tract <- function(geom, tr, id_col){
  if (!inherits(geom,"sf") || !nrow(geom)) {
    return(tr |> sf::st_drop_geometry() |>
             dplyr::transmute(tract_id = as.character(.data[[!!id_col]]), km = 0) |>
             dplyr::slice(0))
  }
  tr_id <- tr |> dplyr::select(all_of(id_col))
  idx   <- sf::st_intersects(tr_id, geom, sparse = TRUE)
  rows  <- which(lengths(idx) > 0)
  if (!length(rows)) {
    return(tr |> sf::st_drop_geometry() |>
             dplyr::transmute(tract_id = as.character(.data[[!!id_col]]), km = 0) |>
             dplyr::slice(0))
  }
  inter <- suppressWarnings(sf::st_intersection(tr_id[rows, ], geom))
  if (!nrow(inter)) {
    return(tr |> sf::st_drop_geometry() |>
             dplyr::transmute(tract_id = as.character(.data[[!!id_col]]), km = 0) |>
             dplyr::slice(0))
  }
  inter |>
    dplyr::mutate(tract_id = as.character(.data[[id_col]]),
                  km = as.numeric(sf::st_length(geometry))/1000) |>
    sf::st_drop_geometry() |>
    dplyr::group_by(tract_id) |>
    dplyr::summarise(km = sum(km, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")
}

add_tr <- length_by_tract(added,   tracts_work, id_col) |> dplyr::mutate(Change = "Added")
rem_tr <- length_by_tract(removed, tracts_work, id_col) |> dplyr::mutate(Change = "Removed")
tr_dist <- dplyr::bind_rows(add_tr, rem_tr)

tr_km <- tr_dist |>
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = Change, values_from = km,
                     values_fill = list(km = 0), values_fn = list(km = sum)) |>
  dplyr::mutate(Added = dplyr::coalesce(Added, 0),
                Removed = dplyr::coalesce(Removed, 0))

# ---- Build tracts_plot (for strata) -----------------------------------------
tracts_plot <- tracts_work |>
  dplyr::mutate(tract_id = as.character(.data[[id_col]])) |>
  dplyr::left_join(tr_km, by = "tract_id") |>
  dplyr::mutate(Added = dplyr::coalesce(Added, 0), Removed = dplyr::coalesce(Removed, 0))

# ---- Create/fetch 'stratum' -------------------------------------------------
nm <- names(tracts_plot)
pick <- function(nm_vec, cands){ hit <- intersect(cands, nm_vec); if (length(hit)) hit[1] else NA_character_ }
dens_col <- pick(nm, c("density_class","dens_class","dens_cat","density_cat","density_q","dens_q","density","dens"))
cent_col <- pick(nm, c("centrality_class","centr_class","centr_cat","centrality_cat","centrality_q","centr_q","centrality","centr"))

if ("stratum" %in% nm) {
  tracts_plot <- tracts_plot %>% dplyr::mutate(stratum = as.character(stratum))
} else if (!is.na(dens_col) && !is.na(cent_col)) {
  tracts_plot <- tracts_plot %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      density_class    = if (is.numeric(.data[[dens_col]])) dplyr::ntile(.data[[dens_col]], 3) else as.character(.data[[dens_col]]),
      centrality_class = if (is.numeric(.data[[cent_col]])) dplyr::ntile(.data[[cent_col]], 3) else as.character(.data[[cent_col]]),
      stratum = paste0("D", density_class, "_C", centrality_class)
    )
} else {
  tracts_plot <- tracts_plot %>% dplyr::mutate(stratum = "All")
}

# ---- Summarise & print ------------------------------------------------------
stratum_summary <- tracts_plot %>%
  sf::st_drop_geometry() %>%
  dplyr::group_by(stratum) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(Added_km = sum(Added, na.rm = TRUE),
                   Removed_km = sum(Removed, na.rm = TRUE),
                   .groups = "drop") %>%
  dplyr::arrange(stratum)

tot_added   <- sum(stratum_summary$Added_km,   na.rm = TRUE)
tot_removed <- sum(stratum_summary$Removed_km, na.rm = TRUE)

stratum_out <- stratum_summary %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Added_pct   = if (tot_added   > 0) sprintf("%.1f%%", 100*Added_km/tot_added)   else "0.0%",
    Removed_pct = if (tot_removed > 0) sprintf("%.1f%%", 100*Removed_km/tot_removed) else "0.0%"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(dplyr::across(c(Added_km, Removed_km), ~round(.x, 1)))

knitr::kable(
  stratum_out,
  caption = "Table 2: OSM-estimated additions and removals (2019–2023) by density × centrality stratum",
  align = c("l","r","r","r","r")
)
```

#### Validation results

- 129 points across 9 strata 

- 34 ADD · 7 REMOVE · 88 NONCI

- 84 usable (both years verifiable)

```{r}
#| label: 24-pick-excel
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

# EXACT file you uploaded
FILE <- "outputs/barcelona_samples_2019_2023_filled.xlsx"

# helper: “yes” normalizer
is_yes <- function(x){
  x <- tolower(trimws(as.character(x)))
  x %in% c("yes","y","true","1","sí","si","s\u00ed")
}

# reader that:
# - reads the exact sheet you ask for (ADD/REMOVE/NONCI)
# - if verifiable_* columns are missing, defaults them to TRUE (so rows aren’t dropped)
# - if stratum missing, sets "All"
safe_read_exact <- function(path, sheet_name){
  df <- tryCatch(readxl::read_xlsx(path, sheet = sheet_name),
                 error = function(e) tibble::tibble())
  if (!nrow(df)) {
    return(tibble::tibble(
      present_2019    = character(),
      present_2023    = character(),
      verifiable_2019 = logical(),
      verifiable_2023 = logical(),
      stratum         = character()
    ))
  }
  names(df) <- trimws(names(df))
  if (!"stratum" %in% names(df))         df$stratum <- "All"
  if (!"verifiable_2019" %in% names(df)) df$verifiable_2019 <- TRUE
  if (!"verifiable_2023" %in% names(df)) df$verifiable_2023 <- TRUE

  dplyr::mutate(
    df,
    present_2019    = tolower(trimws(as.character(.data$present_2019))),
    present_2023    = tolower(trimws(as.character(.data$present_2023))),
    verifiable_2019 = ifelse(is.na(.data$verifiable_2019), FALSE, is_yes(.data$verifiable_2019) | (.data$verifiable_2019 == TRUE)),
    verifiable_2023 = ifelse(is.na(.data$verifiable_2023), FALSE, is_yes(.data$verifiable_2023) | (.data$verifiable_2023 == TRUE)),
    stratum         = as.character(.data$stratum)
  )
}
```

```{r}
#| label: 25-validation-stratum-summary
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(readxl); library(dplyr); library(tidyr); library(tibble); library(stringr); library(sf)
})

# -------- 0) Pick Excel (reuse FILE if already defined) ----------------------
if (!exists("FILE")) {
  pat  <- paste0("^", city_tag, "_samples_2019_2023_\\d{8}-\\d{4}\\.xlsx$")
  cand <- list.files("outputs", pattern = pat, full.names = TRUE)
  stopifnot(length(cand) > 0)
  FILE <- cand[which.max(file.info(cand)$mtime)]
}

# -------- 1) Helpers ---------------------------------------------------------
is_yes <- function(x){
  x <- tolower(str_trim(as.character(x)))
  x %in% c("yes","y","true","1","sí","si","s\u00ed")
}

empty_sheet <- function(){
  tibble(
    tract_id        = character(),
    present_2019    = character(),
    present_2023    = character(),
    verifiable_2019 = logical(),
    verifiable_2023 = logical(),
    stratum         = character()
  )
}

safe_read_exact <- function(path, sheet_name){
  df <- tryCatch(readxl::read_xlsx(path, sheet = sheet_name, .name_repair = "minimal"),
                 error = function(e) tibble::tibble())
  if (!nrow(df)) return(empty_sheet())

  nm0 <- trimws(names(df))
  bad_header <- length(nm0) == 0 ||
                any(nm0 == "" | grepl("^\\.\\.\\.", nm0)) ||
                grepl("Tolerance windows", nm0[1], fixed = TRUE)
  if (bad_header) {
    df <- tryCatch(readxl::read_xlsx(path, sheet = sheet_name, skip = 2, .name_repair = "minimal"),
                   error = function(e) tibble::tibble())
    if (!nrow(df)) return(empty_sheet())
  }

  names(df) <- trimws(names(df))

  if (!"tract_id"        %in% names(df)) df$tract_id        <- NA_character_
  if (!"present_2019"    %in% names(df)) df$present_2019    <- NA
  if (!"present_2023"    %in% names(df)) df$present_2023    <- NA
  if (!"stratum"         %in% names(df)) df$stratum         <- NA_character_
  if (!"verifiable_2019" %in% names(df)) df$verifiable_2019 <- TRUE
  if (!"verifiable_2023" %in% names(df)) df$verifiable_2023 <- TRUE

  dplyr::mutate(
    df,
    tract_id        = as.character(tract_id),
    present_2019    = tolower(stringr::str_trim(as.character(present_2019))),
    present_2023    = tolower(stringr::str_trim(as.character(present_2023))),
    verifiable_2019 = ifelse(is.na(verifiable_2019), FALSE,
                             verifiable_2019 == TRUE | is_yes(verifiable_2019)),
    verifiable_2023 = ifelse(is.na(verifiable_2023), FALSE,
                             verifiable_2023 == TRUE | is_yes(verifiable_2023)),
    stratum         = ifelse(stringr::str_trim(as.character(stratum)) == "", NA, as.character(stratum))
  )
}

# -------- 2) Build a tract_id -> stratum lookup ------------------------------
get_stratum_lookup <- function(){
  tr <- if (exists("tracts_work")) tracts_work else if (exists("tracts")) tracts else NULL
  if (is.null(tr)) return(NULL)

  nm <- names(tr)
  id_col <- dplyr::case_when(
    "tract_id"    %in% nm ~ "tract_id",
    "CUSEC"       %in% nm ~ "CUSEC",
    "codi_seccio" %in% nm ~ "codi_seccio",
    TRUE ~ nm[1]
  )

  has_stratum <- "stratum" %in% nm
  dens_col <- if ("density_class"    %in% nm) "density_class" else if ("dens_class" %in% nm) "dens_class" else NA
  cent_col <- if ("centrality_class" %in% nm) "centrality_class" else if ("centr_class"%in% nm) "centr_class" else NA

  out <- tr %>% st_drop_geometry() %>% as_tibble()
  if (!has_stratum && !is.na(dens_col) && !is.na(cent_col)) {
    out <- out %>%
      mutate(
        density_class    = if (is.numeric(.data[[dens_col]])) ntile(.data[[dens_col]], 3) else .data[[dens_col]],
        centrality_class = if (is.numeric(.data[[cent_col]])) ntile(.data[[cent_col]], 3) else .data[[cent_col]],
        stratum = paste0("D", density_class, "_C", centrality_class)
      )
  }
  if (!("stratum" %in% names(out))) return(NULL)

  out %>%
    transmute(
      tract_id = as.character(.data[[id_col]]),
      stratum  = as.character(stratum)
    ) %>%
    distinct()
}

strata_lkp <- get_stratum_lookup()

fill_stratum <- function(df){
  if (is.null(strata_lkp) || !"tract_id" %in% names(df)) {
    df %>% mutate(stratum = coalesce(stratum, "All"))
  } else {
    df %>%
      left_join(strata_lkp, by = "tract_id", suffix = c("", ".lkp")) %>%
      mutate(stratum = coalesce(stratum, stratum.lkp, "All")) %>%
      select(-any_of("stratum.lkp"))
  }
}

# -------- 3) READ sheets (exact names) ---------------------------------------
add_tbl   <- safe_read_exact(FILE, "ADD")     %>% fill_stratum()
rem_tbl   <- safe_read_exact(FILE, "REMOVE")  %>% fill_stratum()
nonci_tbl <- safe_read_exact(FILE, "NONCI")   %>% fill_stratum()

# -------- 4) Universe of strata so zeros show up -----------------------------
all_strata <- sort(unique(c(add_tbl$stratum, rem_tbl$stratum, nonci_tbl$stratum)))
if (!length(all_strata)) all_strata <- "All"

# -------- 5) USABLE rows (verifiable both years) -----------------------------
usable_tbl <- bind_rows(
  mutate(add_tbl,   class = "ADD"),
  mutate(rem_tbl,   class = "REMOVE"),
  mutate(nonci_tbl, class = "NONCI")
) %>%
  filter(verifiable_2019, verifiable_2023)

# -------- 6) SUMMARY (stratum × class) ---------------------------------------
summary_stratum_class <- usable_tbl %>%
  count(stratum, class, name = "n") %>%
  complete(
    stratum = all_strata,
    class   = c("REMOVE","ADD","NONCI"),
    fill    = list(n = 0L)
  ) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = class, values_from = n, values_fill = 0L)

wanted_cols <- c("stratum","REMOVE","ADD","NONCI")
for (cc in setdiff(wanted_cols, names(summary_stratum_class))) summary_stratum_class[[cc]] <- 0L

summary_stratum_class <- summary_stratum_class %>%
  select(all_of(wanted_cols)) %>%
  mutate(Total = REMOVE + ADD + NONCI) %>%
  arrange(stratum)

summary_stratum_class_full <- bind_rows(
  summary_stratum_class,
  summarise(summary_stratum_class,
            stratum = "TOTAL",
            REMOVE  = sum(REMOVE,  na.rm = TRUE),
            ADD     = sum(ADD,     na.rm = TRUE),
            NONCI   = sum(NONCI,   na.rm = TRUE),
            Total   = sum(Total,   na.rm = TRUE))
)

knitr::kable(
  summary_stratum_class_full,
  caption = "Table 3: Validation points by class and stratum",
  align   = c("l","r","r","r","r"),
  digits  = 0
)
```

```{r}
#| label: 26-validation-metrics
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| paged-print: false

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(readxl); library(dplyr); library(tibble); library(stringr)
})

# Use existing FILE if set; otherwise pick newest
if (!exists("FILE")) {
  pat  <- paste0("^", city_tag, "_samples_2019_2023_\\d{8}-\\d{4}\\.xlsx$")
  xls  <- list.files("outputs", pattern = pat, full.names = TRUE)
  stopifnot(length(xls) > 0)
  FILE <- xls[which.max(file.info(xls)$mtime)]
}

# ---------- helpers -----------------------------------------------------------
is_yes <- function(x){
  y <- tolower(str_trim(as.character(x)))
  y %in% c("yes","y","true","1","sí","si","s\u00ed","present","presenta","presente")
}
is_no <- function(x){
  y <- tolower(str_trim(as.character(x)))
  y %in% c("no","n","false","0","absent","absenta","ausente")
}
norm_yn <- function(x){
  ifelse(is_yes(x), "yes",
         ifelse(is_no(x), "no", NA_character_))
}

safe_read_exact <- function(path, sheet){
  df <- tryCatch(read_xlsx(path, sheet = sheet, .name_repair = "minimal"),
                 error = function(e) tibble())
  nm <- trimws(names(df))
  if (!nrow(df) || any(nm == "" | grepl("^\\.\\.\\.", nm)) || grepl("Tolerance windows", nm[1], fixed = TRUE)) {
    df <- read_xlsx(path, sheet = sheet, skip = 2, .name_repair = "minimal")
  }
  names(df) <- trimws(names(df))

  need <- c("present_2019","present_2023")
  for (mc in setdiff(need, names(df))) df[[mc]] <- NA_character_

  if (!"verifiable_2019" %in% names(df)) df$verifiable_2019 <- "yes"
  if (!"verifiable_2023" %in% names(df)) df$verifiable_2023 <- "yes"

  df %>%
    mutate(
      present_2019    = norm_yn(present_2019),
      present_2023    = norm_yn(present_2023),
      verifiable_2019 = is_yes(verifiable_2019),
      verifiable_2023 = is_yes(verifiable_2023)
    )
}

# ---------- read EXACT sheets (no mapping) -----------------------------------
add <- safe_read_exact(FILE, "ADD")
rem <- safe_read_exact(FILE, "REMOVE")
gen <- safe_read_exact(FILE, "NONCI")   # NONCI provides FNs

# ---------- Confusion rules (usable = verifiable both years) -----------------
add_v <- add %>%
  filter(verifiable_2019, verifiable_2023) %>%
  filter(!is.na(present_2019), !is.na(present_2023)) %>%
  mutate(
    tp = (present_2019 == "no"  & present_2023 == "yes"),
    fp = (present_2019 == "no"  & present_2023 == "no") |
         (present_2019 == "yes" & present_2023 == "yes")
  )

rem_v <- rem %>%
  filter(verifiable_2019, verifiable_2023) %>%
  filter(!is.na(present_2019), !is.na(present_2023)) %>%
  mutate(
    tp = (present_2019 == "yes" & present_2023 == "no"),
    fp = (present_2019 == "no"  & present_2023 == "no") |
         (present_2019 == "yes" & present_2023 == "yes")
  )

gen_v <- gen %>%
  filter(verifiable_2019, verifiable_2023) %>%
  filter(!is.na(present_2019), !is.na(present_2023)) %>%
  mutate(
    fn_add = (present_2019 == "no"  & present_2023 == "yes"),
    fn_rem = (present_2019 == "yes" & present_2023 == "no")
  )

# ---------- Counts ------------------------------------------------------------
n_add_usable <- nrow(add_v)
n_rem_usable <- nrow(rem_v)

TP_add <- sum(add_v$tp, na.rm = TRUE); FP_add <- sum(add_v$fp, na.rm = TRUE)
FN_add <- sum(gen_v$fn_add, na.rm = TRUE)

TP_rem <- sum(rem_v$tp, na.rm = TRUE); FP_rem <- sum(rem_v$fp, na.rm = TRUE)
FN_rem <- sum(gen_v$fn_rem, na.rm = TRUE)

TP_T <- TP_add + TP_rem; FP_T <- FP_add + FP_rem; FN_T <- FN_add + FN_rem
n_tot_usable <- n_add_usable + n_rem_usable

# ---------- Metrics & CIs -----------------------------------------------------
metric <- function(tp, fp, fn){
  precision <- ifelse(tp + fp > 0, tp / (tp + fp), NA_real_)
  recall    <- ifelse(tp + fn > 0, tp / (tp + fn), NA_real_)
  f1        <- ifelse((precision + recall) > 0, 2*precision*recall/(precision + recall), NA_real_)
  list(precision = precision, recall = recall, f1 = f1)
}
p_ci <- function(x, n){
  if (is.na(x) || is.na(n) || n == 0) return(c(NA_real_, NA_real_))
  round(suppressWarnings(prop.test(x, n, correct = FALSE)$conf.int), 3)
}

m_add <- metric(TP_add, FP_add, FN_add)
m_rem <- metric(TP_rem, FP_rem, FN_rem)
m_tot <- metric(TP_T,   FP_T,   FN_T)

add_prec_ci <- p_ci(TP_add, TP_add + FP_add)
add_rec_ci  <- p_ci(TP_add, TP_add + FN_add)
rem_prec_ci <- p_ci(TP_rem, TP_rem + FP_rem)
rem_rec_ci  <- p_ci(TP_rem, TP_rem + FN_rem)
tot_prec_ci <- p_ci(TP_T,   TP_T   + FP_T)
tot_rec_ci  <- p_ci(TP_T,   TP_T   + FN_T)

# ---------- Output table ------------------------------------------------------
t_class <- tibble(
  Class        = c("ADD","REMOVE","Pooled"),
  `n (usable)` = c(n_add_usable, n_rem_usable, n_tot_usable),
  TP           = c(TP_add, TP_rem, TP_T),
  FP           = c(FP_add, FP_rem, FP_T),
  FN           = c(FN_add, FN_rem, FN_T),
  Precision    = sprintf("%.3f", c(m_add$precision, m_rem$precision, m_tot$precision)),
  `Precision (95% CI)` = c(
    sprintf("%.3f [%.3f–%.3f]", m_add$precision, add_prec_ci[1], add_prec_ci[2]),
    sprintf("%.3f [%.3f–%.3f]", m_rem$precision, rem_prec_ci[1], rem_prec_ci[2]),
    sprintf("%.3f [%.3f–%.3f]", m_tot$precision, tot_prec_ci[1], tot_prec_ci[2])
  ),
  Recall       = sprintf("%.3f", c(m_add$recall, m_rem$recall, m_tot$recall)),
  `Recall (95% CI)` = c(
    sprintf("%.3f [%.3f–%.3f]", m_add$recall, add_rec_ci[1], add_rec_ci[2]),
    sprintf("%.3f [%.3f–%.3f]", m_rem$recall, rem_rec_ci[1], rem_rec_ci[2]),
    sprintf("%.3f [%.3f–%.3f]", m_tot$recall, tot_rec_ci[1], tot_rec_ci[2])
  ),
  F1           = sprintf("%.3f", c(m_add$f1, m_rem$f1, m_tot$f1))
)

knitr::kable(
  t_class,
  caption = "Table 4: Validation performance (usable points only)",
  align   = c("l","r","r","r","r","r","r","r","r","r"),
  digits  = 3
)
```

## Interpretation and calibration

#### Interpretation

- OSM **captures most new bike lanes** but is less consistent in detecting removals.

- Common issues: re-tagging (changes in OSM attributes without real alterations), small geometry edits, and *map churn* (frequent re-editing that creates apparent additions or removals)

- Overall → good proxy for additions, and a moderate/weak proxy for removals, slightly overestimates total growth

#### Calibration potential

- These validation metrics not only show how reliable OSM is, but also provide a way to **calibrate its estimates**.

> Example: if precision = 0.77, multiply OSM-detected additions by 0.77 for truer estimate.

- Stratified metrics allow **spatial calibration**, improving cross-city comparability

<!-- ## Next steps -->

<!-- - Extend comparison **2015 → 2023** (longer, richer trend) -->

<!-- - Add **second researcher** for inter-rater reliability -->

<!-- - Scale to **other ATRAPA cities** (Paris, Warsaw, Milan, …)? -->

<!-- - Integrate **calibration factors** into future indicators? -->
